title: redirect vs fileinto require-declaration asymmetry not explained at the enforcement site
description: lib.rs check_extension_use (line 204) lists EXTENSION_COMMANDS = [fileinto, reject] but not redirect. The reason (redirect is a base RFC 5228 action; fileinto and reject are extensions) is documented in a comment in evaluator.rs but not near the EXTENSION_COMMANDS constant where a reader would naturally look. Add a comment at the constant definition: '// redirect and keep/discard/stop are base RFC 5228 actions (no require needed). // fileinto (§4.3), reject (RFC 5429) require explicit require declarations.'
